senses.definition_en: a group of people related by blood or marriage, typically parents and their children

examples.en: My family gathers together every Friday night.
examples.fa: خانواده من هر جمعه‌شب دور هم جمع می‌شوند.

senses.definition_en: a group of related things, such as languages, plants, or species, that share common features

examples.en: Persian belongs to the Indo-European language family.
examples.fa: زبان فارسی متعلق به خانواده زبان‌های هند و اروپایی است.

notes: In British English, "family" can take either singular or plural verb agreement ("my family is/are coming"); American English generally prefers the singular.
